description: MyAnimeList MCP server: Jikan-powered reads plus official MAL personal-list management.
name: io.github.Grinv/mal-mcp

environmentVariables.description: MAL app Client ID (type 'other', myanimelist.net/apiconfig). Then run login_mal to authorize.
environmentVariables.name: MAL_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: OAuth refresh token (one-time auth, docs/auth.md); enables personal-list tools with auto-refresh.
environmentVariables.name: MAL_REFRESH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Advanced: standalone MAL access token. Works ~30 days without refresh; usually leave unset.
environmentVariables.name: MAL_ACCESS_TOKEN
